basic_details.job_title: SASTRA Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: SASTRA Deemed University (SASTRA) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.sastra.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SASTRA Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M. E / M.Tech. / M. Sc. in Environmental Engineering, and Chemical Engineering.
qualification.details: M. E / M.Tech. / M. Sc. in Environmental Engineering, and Chemical Engineering.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SASTRA Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.sastra_deemed_university: M. E / M.Tech. / M. Sc. in Environmental Engineering, and Chemical Engineering.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SASTRA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SASTRA Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

SASTRA Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SASTRA Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SASTRA Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the required qualifications for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Associate position, candidates must possess an M. E / M.Tech. / M. Sc. in Environmental Engineering or Chemical Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month for the Project Associate role.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the SASTRA Project Associate job?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Associate position is a contractual job, offering a fixed-term employment opportunity.

faq.question: Q8. Where is SASTRA Deemed University located?
faq.answer: SASTRA Deemed University is located in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
